description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a sleek, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light wall panels, large windows, and a prominent garage on one side. The property is surrounded by a paved driveway, a front lawn, and several evenly spaced trees, giving it a suburban feel. The roof includes a small terrace area and solar panels, adding to its contemporary aesthetic. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and smaller ones distributed across the facade. The main entryway is set back, partially sheltered by an overhang, and is accessible via a short walkway from the street.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior panels, surrounded by a driveway, lawn, and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, driveway, and a symmetrical arrangement of trees and lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway extension, and the elongated facade with large windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, terrace area, and the backyard with additional trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage, side lawn, and the continuation of the modern facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with an overhang, short walkway, and minimal decorative elements
